summary: Backend scheduler API testing completed. All 8 requested features verified and working correctly. 16/16 tests passed. Scheduler starts on app boot with 2 registered jobs, manual triggers work for both date-triggers and campaign-steps, deduplication prevents duplicate messages on same day, campaign step processor advances enrollments correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Scheduler correctly implements APScheduler with AsyncIOScheduler
Daily date triggers run at 8:00 UTC via CronTrigger
Campaign step processor runs every 15 minutes via IntervalTrigger
Deduplication uses date_trigger_log collection with today's date comparison
Campaign enrollment messages_sent array properly tracks step history
calculate_next_send_date supports both legacy (delay_value/delay_unit) and model (delay_days/delay_months) fields
seed_data_creation: Test used existing test data: contact 699f25926cd30496c5065496 with today's birthday, campaign 699f25ce6cd30496c506549c, enrollment 699f25d36cd30496c506549d
context_for_next_testing_agent: Scheduler is fully functional. Key verified behaviors: 1) GET /api/scheduler/status returns running=true with 2 jobs (daily_date_triggers at 8:00 UTC, campaign_step_processor every 15min). 2) POST /api/scheduler/trigger/date-triggers manually runs date sweep - returns users_processed and messages_sent. 3) POST /api/scheduler/trigger/campaign-steps manually processes pending enrollments. 4) Deduplication prevents same-day resends using date_trigger_log collection. 5) Enrollment advancement: step 1→2 with messages_sent array tracking history. 6) Birthday trigger matches contacts by month/day comparison.

features_verified.scheduler_2_registered_jobs: PASS - daily_date_triggers and campaign_step_processor jobs registered
features_verified.manual_date_trigger_sweep: PASS - POST /api/scheduler/trigger/date-triggers returns results with users_processed and messages_sent
features_verified.manual_campaign_step_processing: PASS - POST /api/scheduler/trigger/campaign-steps returns results with pending_found and processed
features_verified.date_trigger_deduplication: PASS - Second run on same day sends 0 messages (dedup working)
features_verified.campaign_step_advancement: PASS - Enrollment advanced from step 1 to step 2 with messages_sent tracking
features_verified.enrollment_completion: PASS - Status set to 'completed' after final step (code verified)
features_verified.scheduler_timestamps_updated: PASS - last_date_trigger_run and last_campaign_step_run timestamps updated after manual triggers
features_verified.birthday_trigger_matching: PASS - Birthday trigger correctly matches contacts where birthday month/day equals today

mocked_apis.note: Twilio SMS is MOCKED - messages are queued to DB messages collection with auto_sent=true instead of actually sending via Twilio

rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All requested features verified working correctly
